title: Apply User-Requested Changes to Portfolio Site

requirements.summary: Apply visible polish improvements: increase hero headline size, fix navigation scroll offsets, add phone placeholder, adjust portfolio grid height, and update footer copyright to 2025
acceptanceCriteria: Hero headline is visually large and bold on desktop screens
All nav links (Home, Work, Education, Contact) scroll correctly to their sections
Contact section shows a phone placeholder '+91 XXXXX XXXXX'
Portfolio grid items have adequate height for visual balance
Footer copyright line shows © 2025 Sulekha Sahoo

file_operations.description: Increase the hero headline font size for greater visual impact on desktop by modifying the text size classes from text-5xl md:text-7xl to text-6xl md:text-8xl or larger for the main headline element

Fix navigation scroll behavior to ensure all links scroll precisely to their target sections by adjusting the scroll offset in the handleNavClick function or adding scroll-margin-top to section elements to account for the fixed navigation bar height
Add a phone number placeholder '+91 XXXXX XXXXX' to the contact information display by inserting a new contact info card with a Phone icon between the existing email and location cards
Increase the portfolio grid item height for better visual balance by modifying the aspect-ratio or min-height classes on the portfolio item containers to make them slightly taller
Update the footer copyright year from 2024 to 2025 by changing the year displayed in the copyright text element to read '© 2025 Sulekha Sahoo. All rights reserved.'
